title: Substack vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Postmark?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
